case_title: LVNV FUNDING LLC ASSIGNEE OF CREDIT ONE BANK, N.A. VS. ZI HUANG et al

docket_entries.description: EXEMPT COLLECTIONS (RULE 3.740), COMPLAINT AND DECLARATIONS RE: VENUE & REDUCED FEE FILED BY PLAINTIFF LVNV FUNDING LLC ASSIGNEE OF CREDIT ONE BANK, N.A. AS TO DEFENDANT HUANG, ZI DOES 1 TO 100, INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  DEC-23-2013
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF LVNV FUNDING LLC ASSIGNEE OF CREDIT ONE BANK, N.A. SERVED JUN-28-2013, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT HUANG, ZI
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR AUG-12-2014 IN DEPARTMENT 610 AT 10:30 AM FOR FAILURE TO OBTAIN AN ANSWER(S) FROM, OR ENTER DEFAULT(S) AGAINST, DEFENDANT(S). NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS FILED BY PLAINTIFF LVNV FUNDING LLC ASSIGNEE OF CREDIT ONE BANK, N.A.
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE
SUBSTITUTION OF ATTORNEY: ZIDE, FLINT COREY SUBSTITUTED FOR BRACHFELD, ERICA L AS ATTORNEY FOR LVNV FUNDING LLC ASSIGNEE OF CREDIT ONE BANK, N.A.
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF AUG-12-2014 IS OFF CALENDAR. DISMISSAL ON FILE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
